fields.description:
## Context / Problem

Phase 2 of the reconciler vendor-adapter seam (follow-up to 44be / ADR 0035). Phase 1
authored ADR 0035, established `adapters/jira/`, and moved `jira_fields.py`. Phase 2 turns
the structural seam into an enforced-by-interface one: pin the backend interface (ADR 0035
┬¦(d), `docs/adr/0035-reconciler-vendor-adapter-seam.md`), route the core through it, and
complete the physical migration of the remaining Jira modules ŌĆö so a second backend (GitHub
Issues, Linear, ŌĆ”) can be added by implementing `adapters/<x>/` with no core rewrite. The
first real second backend is out of scope, tracked by epic `be74-7832-03a8-48ac` (this epic
`blocks` it).

## Design resolution (the canonical-comparison principle)

The first attempt to finish core neutrality (ticket 97f2's original plan / Gerrit change
920) extended the Backend port with the outbound differ's vendor-shaped comparison helpers
(`_diff_fields` etc., parameterized on Jira snapshot dicts). Plan review blocked it,
correctly: ADR 0035 ┬¦(d) says the core owns diff/apply and the port only translates, so
vendor-shaped helpers belong neither on the port nor in core. The resolution, pinned by this
epic and to be recorded in ADR 0035 ┬¦(d):

**Core compares only canonical (local-vocabulary) shapes. Vendor shapes cross core solely as
opaque payloads, produced by port calls at emission boundaries
(`OutboundMapper.map_local_to_remote`, link-payload translation) and consumed by port calls
at ingestion boundaries (`InboundMapper.map_remote_to_local`, remote-link reading).** The
inbound differ already works this way (`inbound_differ.py:159`); the remaining children
bring the outbound differ, link differ, absence probe, and rich-text/comment-limit paths to
parity, plus the scalar port surface (project scope, env-readiness, neutral exceptions).
Gerrit change 920 is abandoned; its scalar subset is salvageable by cherry-pick from
worktree `impl-4af8-differ-di` (see re-scoped child 97f2).

## Child decomposition

Landed and closed:

- S1 `ef33-eaf6-a545-4bfb` ŌĆö ADR 0035 ┬¦(d) pins the interface (change 900).
- S2 `ce4d-c3ca-5412-4798` ŌĆö Backend port + role/capability Protocols + `RemoteRef` + thin
  `JiraBackend` + contract suite (901).
- S3 `94f9-a9a0-7475-4e75` ŌĆö `reconciler.backend` config + in-tree registry +
  `select_backend()` (902).
- S4 `6673-7636-a116-4f90` ŌĆö 4 transport-construction sites routed through
  `select_backend().transport`; provider literals ŌåÆ `backend.vendor`; ~34 test doubles
  migrated (903).
- S5 `dfb9-d2d1-455d-48d9` ŌĆö 8 vendor modules physically relocated into `adapters/jira/`
  (acli*, adf, outbound_fields, comment_limits) + loader/import updates (905).
- `4af8-2d88-719e-4478` ŌĆö vendor mapper entrypoints injected into
  outbound_differ/inbound_differ/apply_inbound via the port (914).

Open (the remaining neutrality work, disjoint edit-sets, independently reviewable,
parallel-safe):

- `97f2-2d98-2eff-41c1` (re-scoped) ŌĆö scalar port surface: `project`/`query_project`,
  `assert_env_ready()`, neutral `BackendAssigneeNotFoundError`; rewires fetcher, applier,
  apply_handlers, _attestation.
- Canonical-shape outbound field diff ŌĆö the differ canonicalizes the snapshot via
  `InboundMapper` and diffs local-vs-local; vendor payload built only via the injected
  `OutboundMapper` at emission; vendor comparison helpers become adapter-internal; ADR ┬¦(d)
  amendment.
- Canonical link diff ŌĆö `SupportsLinks` gains `map_remote_links` +
  `link_payload_for_relation`; `outbound_links.py` compares canonical relations only.
- Vendor absence probe behind `SupportsAbsenceProbe` ŌĆö Jira REST probe mechanics move to
  `adapters/jira/probe.py`; neutral `ProbeBranch`/`ProbeResult` vocabulary stays in core.
- Canonicalize `reconcile_check.py` (`ad44-9f46-07aa-480c`, depends_on the canonical field
  diff) ŌĆö the checker's local-vs-snapshot comparison reuses the canonical differ machinery
  (`InboundMapper` canonicalization, `assignee_identity` membership, sanitizer description
  parity); its by-path loads of `adapters/jira/outbound_fields.py`/`adf.py` are deleted and
  the gate's documented reconcile_check carve-out is removed.
- Rich-text codec + comment limits behind the port ŌĆö `outbound_comments.py` and
  `inbound_translate.py` route through `FieldSanitizer`/`InboundMapper`; the
  `"rebar_reconciler.adapters.jira"` lazy-key literals are deleted; a sweep gate bans the
  literal in package-root core (single recorded exemption: `inbound_fields.py`, the Jira
  InboundMapper implementation pending physical relocation ŌĆö tracked by follow-up ticket
  `556a-5a1f-adb3-4139`, linked `discovered_from` this epic, out of scope here).

## Success Criteria

A second backend can be introduced by implementing `adapters/<x>/` against the Backend port
alone: no package-root core module names, imports, lazy-loads, or shape-compares anything
Jira-specific. Every deliverable above is covered by exactly one child; children do not
overlap (each owns disjoint core modules; shared `_backend.py`/`adapters/jira/backend.py`
edits are additive per child and recorded in each child's file impact).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] ADR 0035 ┬¦(d) pins the interface (S1); Backend Protocols, `RemoteRef`, contract suite
      passing both `JiraBackend` and test-only `FakeBackend` exist (S2) ŌĆö landed, changes
      900/901.
- [ ] Backend chosen via `config.reconciler.backend` through the registry; default `"jira"`
      reproduces prior behavior end-to-end (S3) ŌĆö landed, change 902.
- [ ] All transport construction and provider literals route through the port (S4); the 8
      vendor modules physically reside under `adapters/jira/` with loaders repointed and no
      re-export shims (S5) ŌĆö landed, changes 903/905.
- [ ] **Zero vendor reach-through in core:** every package-root
      `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/*.py` module has NO `adapters.jira`/
      `acli_subprocess` import (module-level or function-nested), NO
      `"rebar_reconciler.adapters.jira"` lazy-key literal, and NO by-path load of a vendor
      sibling (an `adapters/jira/...` path literal, the `reconcile_check.py:61-75` pattern)
      ŌĆö single recorded exemption: `inbound_fields.py`, the Jira InboundMapper
      implementation ŌĆö verified by the union of AST/sweep cases in
      `tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_neutrality.py` added by the open children
      (incl. the removal of that gate's documented reconcile_check carve-out), green on
      main.
- [ ] **Canonical comparison:** the outbound field and link differs compare only canonical
      shapes; vendor payloads are built/consumed exclusively via port calls; ADR 0035 ┬¦(d)
      records the principle ŌĆö verified by the canonical-diff children's characterization and
      neutrality tests, green on main.
- [ ] All `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/*.py` modules respect the 800-LOC module-size
      gate (`.github/module-size-limit.txt`); the full suite is behavior-preserving (all
      children's `make lint && make typecheck && make test` green; each landed with
      LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1).
